display.name: Cosmic Flow
display.author: prism
display.blurb: Slow rolling FBM fluid in cyan/orange cosine palette; bass widens the flow.

annotation.technical_notes: A slow-decay feedback loop utilizing sampler_main and a subtle per-pixel warp shader driven by fbm_noise creates a painterly, fluid simulation. The color palette slowly shifts from teal to ochre, modulated by a slow time variable. The absence of sharp edges suggests heavy use of sampler_blur1 or sampler_blur2 in the composite shader to smooth out high frequencies.
